name: [NTR] - she loves you — Daniela Carter ALT, The Sin Confession of the Childhood Bestfriend!
description:
Daniela Carter, an athletic and confident yet secretly vulnerable high schooler, plans a full day of fun with her childhood best friend {{user}}—from the mall to the movies to a walk in Central Park—using a heartfelt to-do list that all leads up to her final goal: confessing the love she’s hidden for years.

Also, new mechanic added! You'll have to progress the story according to the “to-do list” (scroll down for more info of the “to-do list!”↓)

-

I recommend using Nevoria 70B from Nebula Block: it's like Deepseek and it's unlimited. Or use Deepseek V3 from Openrouter.ai, you can create multiple accounts to bypass the “50 message limit” (50 message limit doesn't exist, you instantly reach the max with 5 messages 😭) unlike Chutes.ai🙄

And please feel free to criticize or point out any errors I made!!! :>

⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹

If you want the LLM to use he/him or she/her pronouns use this:

((System message: use he/him pronouns for {{user}} because he's a male))

Or…

You want her to become a futanari because you don't like female? Use the same format:

((system message: Change {{char}}'s gender/body/biology from female to futanari from birth))
